description_long: This object is a modern military fighter jet with a sleek, angular fuselage and twin vertical stabilizers at the rear. The wings are sharply swept back and mounted low on the body, with visible hardpoints for external stores or weaponry. The jet features a forward-positioned, enclosed cockpit with a dark, tinted canopy, likely designed for a single pilot. The landing gear is deployed, showing a tricycle configuration with two main gear units and a single nose wheel. The surface is primarily matte gray with subtle markings, including a black insignia on the tail fins and yellow highlights. The engines are mounted at the rear, with large exhaust nozzles visible between the tail fins.
description: A sleek, gray military fighter jet with swept-back wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and a forward, enclosed cockpit. The jet has visible landing gear and rear-mounted engines.
description_view_0: Side view showing the jet's elongated fuselage, swept-back wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and deployed landing gear.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and the wide, angular wingspan.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the tail insignia and engine exhausts.
description_view_3: Top-down view revealing the full wingspan, twin tail fins, and the arrangement of the engines and landing gear.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, sharply swept wings with no visible winglets and slight anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted at the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers with a conventional horizontal stabilizer, forming an H-tail configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with two main gear units and a single nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single-seat canopy.
